hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == /Users/pk/homeassistant/* ]] && git -C /Users/pk/homeassistant add "$f" && { git -C /Users/pk/homeassistant diff --cached --quiet || git -C /Users/pk/homeassistant commit -m "auto: update $(basename "$f") $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" && git -C /Users/pk/homeassistant push origin main; }; } 2>/dev/null || true
